name: Louie Anderson
blurb: He broke through on Rodney Dangerfields Young Comedians Special and The Tonight Show in 1984, created the animated series Life with Louie, hosted Family Feud, and won a 2016 Emmy for playing Christine Baskets on the FX.
bio: Louie Anderson was an American stand-up comedian known for gentle, self-deprecating observational comedy drawn from growing up one of eleven children with an abusive, alcoholic father. He broke through on Rodney Dangerfields Young Comedians Special and The Tonight Show in 1984, created the animated series Life with Louie, hosted Family Feud, and won a 2016 Emmy for playing Christine Baskets on the FX series Baskets.

timeline.ev: Network debut on The Tonight Show and Dangerfields Young Comedians Special
Creates animated series Life with Louie

accolades: Primetime Emmy Award, Outstanding Supporting Actor in a Comedy Series (2016, Baskets)
Two Daytime Emmy Awards (Life with Louie)
Comedy Central 100 Greatest Stand-Ups of All Time
